header.name: Jivan Karlapudi
header.description: Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience building scalable web applications using Java Spring Boot, React.js, MySQL, and RESTful APIs.

footer.title: Interested in building something together?
footer.description: I build user-focused full-stack applications across React frontends, Spring Boot services, database integration, and API-driven workflows. Reach out for internships, junior roles, or project collaboration.

skills.title: Skills
skills.intro: A practical full-stack toolkit across frontend, backend, databases, tools, and engineering fundamentals.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Selected full-stack, frontend, backend, and hackathon work from my resume.

codeMaster.name: Portfolio Website
codeMaster.description: A responsive portfolio built to present my full-stack profile, projects, skills, education, and contact details.

allaw.name: AI Assistant Chrome Extension
allaw.description: A Chrome extension that instantly fetches explanations and summaries using Gemini API integration.I designed a responsive popup UI, optimized the user experience, and connected frontend interactions to API-powered responses.

truthify.name: Inventory Management Application
truthify.description: A full-stack application built with Spring Boot, React.js, and MySQL for record management and search functionality.I integrated REST APIs between frontend and backend modules with dynamic data rendering and clean CRUD workflows.

legalConstat.name: Postman API Testing
legalConstat.description: Tested and documented REST API endpoints, request payloads, responses, and edge cases to support reliable frontend-backend integration.

smartflow.name: Time Locus - Habit Tracker
smartflow.description: A backend-focused habit tracker project using layered Spring Boot architecture, Hibernate/JPA, and MySQL.I built RESTful APIs, tested and documented them with Postman, and focused on maintainable backend structure.

decorNature.name: DevTown Frontend Projects
decorNature.description: Responsive frontend projects built during the DevTown bootcamp using React.js, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, API integration, and component-based architecture.

aimoto.name: Spring Boot CRUD Services
aimoto.description: RESTful services built with Java, Spring Boot, JDBC, Hibernate, JPA, and MySQL for structured CRUD operations and database persistence.

liic.name: Quantum Valley Hackathon
liic.description: Collaborated in a team to develop and present an innovative software solution under strict deadlines.

teslaApp.name: Smart India Hackathon 2025
teslaApp.description: Participated in problem-solving, solution design, and application development for real-world challenges.

emmausConnect.name: GitHub Collaboration
emmausConnect.description: Collaborated with developers using Git and GitHub workflows across full-stack web application development.

wilderGame.name: DSA Practice
wilderGame.description: Actively solving Data Structures and Algorithms problems to strengthen software engineering fundamentals.

legalDirectory.name: Database Integration Practice
legalDirectory.description: Database-backed application practice using MySQL, MongoDB, SQLite, Firebase, SQL, and API-driven data flows.

timeline.title: Journey
timeline.intro: My education, internships, bootcamp experience, projects, and hackathon work.

experiences.description: Developed full-stack web application features using Java Spring Boot, React.js, MySQL, and REST APIs. Worked on CRUD, authentication flows, debugging, and GitHub collaboration.
Built responsive web interfaces with React.js, JavaScript, HTML5, and CSS3 while practicing API integration and component-based architecture.
Built a Chrome extension that fetches explanations and summaries through Gemini APIs with a responsive popup UI.
Developed a Spring Boot, React.js, and MySQL application with record management, search functionality, REST API integration, and dynamic data rendering.
Built RESTful APIs with layered Spring Boot architecture, Hibernate/JPA, MySQL, and Postman-tested documentation.
Collaborated on software solutions under deadlines and participated in problem-solving, solution design, and application development for real-world challenges.

experiences.company: GH Raisoni College of Engineering and Management, Pune
experiences.description: Pursuing Computer Science Engineering with a CGPA of 8.19/10 while strengthening full-stack development, DSA, OOP, MVC, and API integration fundamentals.

faq.title: Do you have any questions?
faq.intro: A quick look at how I work and what I am focused on.

items.question: What kind of role am I looking for?
items.answer: I am looking for internships, junior full-stack developer roles, and project collaborations where I can contribute across React.js frontend work and Java Spring Boot backend development.

items.question: What is my strongest technical focus?
items.answer: My focus is full-stack web development with React.js, JavaScript, Java Spring Boot, REST APIs, MySQL, and practical database integration.

items.question: What experience do I have?
items.answer: My resume includes a Full Stack Developer Internship at Accelerate Infobyte, a DevTown Frontend Development Bootcamp, full-stack projects, hackathons, and active DSA practice.

items.question: How do I approach backend work?
items.answer: I design clear REST APIs, use layered Spring Boot architecture, work with Hibernate/JPA and MySQL, and test/document endpoints with Postman.

items.question: What makes my profile useful to a team?
items.answer: I bring frontend skill with backend awareness, GitHub collaboration, problem-solving, responsibility, continuous learning, and comfort working across API-driven applications.

metadata.title: Jivan Karlapudi | Full Stack Developer
metadata.description: Portfolio of Jivan Karlapudi, a full-stack developer focused on Java Spring Boot, React.js, REST APIs, MySQL, and scalable web applications.
